purpose: Post-story-gate acceptance fixtures for one-prompt video narrative coherence.

planJson.title: Bull Card Comeback
planJson.logline: A cartoon bull is down to one coin, chooses double up, triggers the bonus, and turns the table before the download CTA.

styleBible.characterLock: same bull host, same cap and scarf
styleBible.colorPalette: neon table, gold coins, red-blue UI
styleBible.negativePrompt: real human, inconsistent bull, random text, unreadable UI

creativeStrategy.templateReason: The prompt is a game ad built around an underdog reversal and a visible bonus trigger.
creativeStrategy.hook: Bull has only one coin left while the opponent laughs.
creativeStrategy.conflict: The table shows the bull is behind and must choose whether to risk the last coin.
creativeStrategy.turningPoint: Bull taps the DOUBLE UP BONUS button after the player choice is shown.
creativeStrategy.payoff: Bonus activates, coins burst, score flips, and the opponent reacts.
creativeStrategy.cta: Download now to try the double-up comeback.

storyBeats.title: Double up choice
storyBeats.cause: bull chooses to risk the last coin

actionContinuity.motivationOrPreparation: bull looks from last coin to double-up button
actionContinuity.execution: bull taps the DOUBLE UP BONUS button

storyBeats.title: Score reversal and coin burst
storyBeats.cause: the lit bonus button resolves the double-up choice
storyBeats.effect: coins burst and the bull moves from losing to winning

actionContinuity.execution: bonus flash crosses the score panel
actionContinuity.resultOrReaction: score flips and coins explode outward

storyBeats.title: Download to play
storyBeats.cause: viewer has seen the double-up comeback

actionContinuity.motivationOrPreparation: celebration settles after the score flip
actionContinuity.execution: app icon and download button enter

segments.purpose: Show the losing state and the mocked last coin.
segments.motion: slow push from last coin to opponent laugh
segments.videoPrompt: Bull sees the last coin and opponent mockery in one continuous table shot.
segments.subtitle: One coin left.

segments.motion: hand moves from coin to bonus button
segments.videoPrompt: Only animate the visible choice: bull taps DOUBLE UP BONUS and the button lights.
segments.subtitle: Double up?
segments.cause: bull chooses to risk the last coin

actionContinuity.motivationOrPreparation: bull looks from last coin to button

segments.purpose: Bonus resolves into a visible score reversal.
segments.motion: bonus flash crosses score panel and coins burst
segments.subjectMotion: bull leans forward as score flips
segments.videoPrompt: Animate only the bonus resolution from lit button to score flip and coin burst.
segments.subtitle: Bonus hit!
segments.cause: the lit bonus button resolves the double-up choice

segments.purpose: Show social reaction to the comeback.
segments.videoPrompt: Friends cheer and opponent reacts to the already visible score reversal.
segments.subtitle: Comeback!

segments.motion: game logo and download button enter after celebration
segments.videoPrompt: End card appears after the comeback: app icon, download button, and bull pointing.
segments.subtitle: Play now.
segments.cause: viewer saw the double-up comeback payoff

actionContinuity.motivationOrPreparation: celebration settles after the score flip
actionContinuity.execution: app icon and download button enter

shotGroupingPass.strategy: Keep choice, payoff, reaction, and CTA as separate i2v segments.

planJson.title: Hydrating Serum Proof
planJson.logline: A dry-skin morning problem is solved by serum application, visible hydration proof, brand memory, and purchase CTA.

creativeStrategy.templateReason: Product ad must prove a before/after benefit instead of only showing the bottle.
creativeStrategy.hook: Close morning shot shows tight, dry skin before makeup.
creativeStrategy.conflict: The presenter needs quick hydration without greasy residue.
creativeStrategy.turningPoint: She applies two drops of the serum.
creativeStrategy.payoff: Skin looks dewy and comfortable with a visible moisture meter lift.

storyBeats.title: Two drops applied
storyBeats.cause: presenter chooses serum for the tight-skin problem

storyBeats.title: Moisture proof
storyBeats.effect: hydration meter rises and cheek reflects soft light

storyBeats.title: Brand memory hero
storyBeats.effect: the bottle becomes the remembered solution

actionContinuity.resultOrReaction: presenter holds bottle beside dewy skin

actionContinuity.motivationOrPreparation: hero bottle and dewy proof remain on screen
actionContinuity.execution: shop button fades in beside the bottle
actionContinuity.resultOrReaction: presenter points to the purchase action

segments.videoPrompt: Show dry morning skin and the need for hydration.
segments.subtitle: Morning tightness?

segments.videoPrompt: Two drops are applied from the same bottle.
segments.subtitle: Two drops.

segments.motion: meter rises and skin glow appears
segments.videoPrompt: Moisture meter rises after the serum absorbs.
segments.subtitle: Hydration visible.

segments.videoPrompt: Hero bottle appears after the proof result.
segments.subtitle: Dewy comfort.

segments.videoPrompt: Shop CTA appears after the hydration proof and hero bottle.
segments.subtitle: Try it today.

actionContinuity.motivationOrPreparation: hero bottle and dewy proof remain on screen
actionContinuity.execution: shop button fades in beside the bottle
actionContinuity.resultOrReaction: presenter points to the purchase action

shotGroupingPass.strategy: Keep pain, use, proof, brand memory, and CTA separate.

planJson.title: Portable Blender Offer
planJson.logline: A rushed commuter solves breakfast with a portable blender, sees proof, then gets a limited offer CTA.

creativeStrategy.templateReason: Ecommerce ad needs pain, solution proof, offer value, and CTA.
creativeStrategy.hook: Commuter has no time for breakfast.
creativeStrategy.conflict: Skipping breakfast creates a clear daily pain.
creativeStrategy.turningPoint: Portable blender blends fruit in seconds.
creativeStrategy.payoff: Smoothie is ready and the offer badge makes buying feel timely.
creativeStrategy.cta: Order now before the limited offer ends.

planJson.title: Beef Noodle Sensory Reaction
planJson.logline: Ingredients cook into a steaming bowl, customer reaction proves the taste, then store CTA appears.

creativeStrategy.templateReason: Food ad should move from food preparation to sensory proof and customer reaction.

creativeStrategy.turningPoint: Chef finishes the bowl with hot broth and scallions.
creativeStrategy.payoff: Customer takes first bite and reacts happily.

planJson.title: Blue Coupe Performance Hero

creativeStrategy.payoff: Stable handling and quiet cabin create the hero moment.

storyBeats.title: Hero calm after control

planJson.title: Rain Library Reunion
planJson.logline: Two former friends clash over a yellow umbrella, recognize an old note, reconcile, and invite viewers to continue.

styleBible.characterLock: same two leads and yellow umbrella

creativeStrategy.templateReason: Short drama needs relationship tension, twist, emotional payoff, and continuation CTA.
creativeStrategy.hook: A yellow umbrella blocks the library door in heavy rain.
creativeStrategy.conflict: The two leads blame each other for an old misunderstanding.
creativeStrategy.turningPoint: A handwritten note inside the umbrella reveals the truth.
creativeStrategy.payoff: They realize both waited for each other years ago.

storyBeats.title: Hidden note
storyBeats.cause: umbrella opens and reveals folded note

actionContinuity.motivationOrPreparation: lead opens the umbrella to leave

storyBeats.title: Mutual waiting revealed
storyBeats.cause: the note proves both waited years ago

actionContinuity.execution: they look at each other under umbrella

storyBeats.reactionBeat: both leads pause, tearful but smiling

segments.videoPrompt: Yellow umbrella collision creates the hook at the library door.
segments.subtitle: You again?
segments.cause: heavy rain pushes both to the door

segments.videoPrompt: The two leads blame each other for the old missed meeting.
segments.subtitle: You never came.

segments.videoPrompt: A folded note slips from the umbrella and both leads freeze.
segments.subtitle: What is this?
segments.cause: umbrella opens and reveals folded note

segments.videoPrompt: After reading the note, anger softens into tearful recognition.
segments.subtitle: You waited too?
segments.cause: the note proves both waited years ago
segments.reactionBeat: both leads pause, tearful but smiling

segments.motion: they leave under umbrella to next episode button
segments.videoPrompt: They leave together under the yellow umbrella and the continue CTA appears.
segments.subtitle: Continue watching.

shotGroupingPass.strategy: Separate conflict, twist, payoff, and continuation CTA.

planJson.title: Community Studio Brand Story
planJson.logline: A quiet empty studio becomes a collaborative space, proves the brand promise, and ends with a learn-more CTA.

creativeStrategy.templateReason: Fallback brand story still needs hook, conflict, proof, payoff, and CTA.
creativeStrategy.hook: An empty studio waits before sunrise.
creativeStrategy.conflict: Creators have ideas but lack a shared place to build.
creativeStrategy.turningPoint: The brand opens the studio and tools light up.
creativeStrategy.payoff: Creators collaborate and a finished prototype works.

storyBeats.title: Prototype works

storyBeats.effect: prototype lights up and team celebrates

storyBeats.title: Learn more

storyBeats.effect: viewer is invited to learn more
